summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Admin Order Management, Order Tracking, and Shipping features for Zikra e-commerce. All 17 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI testing confirms all admin dashboard features work correctly: order stats, filters, order detail expansion, shipping modal (Kargola), status changes (Teslim Edildi, Iptal). Customer order tracking page works with valid/invalid order numbers.
seed_data_creation: Created test orders with TEST_ prefix during API testing (TEST_ShippingCustomer, TEST_StatusCustomer, TEST_Deliver)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Order management is fully working. Key test data-testids: tab-orders, tab-products, filter-all, filter-shipped, filter-pending, filter-delivered, filter-cancelled, shipping-modal, input-cargo-company, input-tracking-number, submit-shipping, view-order-{id}, ship-order-{id}, deliver-order-{id}, cancel-order-{id}. For order tracking: tracking-title, tracking-input, tracking-search-btn, tracking-result, tracking-not-found, tracking-status, tracking-cargo-info. Email notifications are MOCKED (logged to console). Payment is also MOCKED.

features_tested.admin_login: PASS - Admin login with admin@zikra.com / admin123 works
features_tested.admin_order_stats: PASS - Shows Toplam, Beklemede, Kargoda, Teslim, Iptal counts
features_tested.admin_order_filters: PASS - All filters work (Tumu, Beklemede, Kargoda, Teslim Edildi, Iptal)
features_tested.admin_order_detail_expand: PASS - Eye icon expands order showing products, shipping address, cargo info
features_tested.admin_shipping_modal: PASS - Kargola button opens modal with cargo company dropdown and tracking number input
features_tested.admin_ship_order: PASS - Submitting shipping info auto-sets status to 'shipped' and shows success toast
features_tested.admin_deliver_order: PASS - 'Teslim Edildi' button changes status to 'delivered'
features_tested.order_tracking_valid: PASS - /order-tracking shows order details with 4-step progress bar for valid order number
features_tested.order_tracking_invalid: PASS - Shows 'Siparis Bulunamadi' message for invalid order number
features_tested.header_tracking_link: PASS - 'Siparis Takibi' link visible in header navigation
features_tested.checkout_email_field: PASS - Checkout form includes customer_email field (data-testid='input-email')

backend_tests.order_filtering: PASS - Status filters (pending, shipped, delivered, cancelled) work correctly
backend_tests.shipping_update: PASS - PUT /api/orders/{id}/shipping auto-sets status to shipped
backend_tests.email_notification: PASS - Mock email notification returns sent:true, mock:true
backend_tests.status_update: PASS - PUT /api/orders/{id}/status changes order status correctly

mocked_api_note: Email notifications are MOCKED - send_shipping_notification() in utils/email.py logs to console instead of sending real emails. Payment is also MOCKED via POST /api/orders/mock-payment/{id}.
